subject: Titagarh wins Rs 1,800 crore metro rail car order from Pune Metro
ai_summary: Titagarh secures Pune Metro rail car order of Rs 1800 crore. Adds meaningfully to its order book. Revenue from this order expected over FY26-28.

subject: BEL receives Rs 2,200 crore EW suite order from Indian Army
ai_summary: BEL wins a Rs 2200 crore electronic warfare suite order from the Indian Army. This adds to its Rs 72000 crore order book and reflects continued defence indigenisation trend.

subject: Dixon appoints new Chief Technology Officer
ai_summary: Dixon appoints a new CTO to drive technology capability for smartphone and EMS manufacturing. Neutral for near-term financials but positive for long-term capability building.

subject: Sun Pharma receives USFDA approval for key generic
ai_summary: Sun Pharma receives USFDA final approval for its generic version of a branded drug. Positive for US formulations revenue. Limited near-term impact given competitive market.

subject: HAL reports Q4FY25 PAT of Rs 1,850 crore up 22% YoY
ai_summary: HAL Q4FY25 results show strong growth with PAT up 22% YoY to Rs 1850 crore. Revenue up 18% to Rs 6800 crore. Order inflow strong.

subject: MDL receives Rs 12,000 crore submarine contract from Ministry of Defence
ai_summary: Mazagon Dock gets a Rs 12000 crore submarine contract — the single largest order in the company's history. Materially positive for 5-7 year revenue visibility.

subject: Data Patterns secures Rs 450 crore radar order from Air Force
ai_summary: Data Patterns wins a Rs 450 crore radar system order from the Indian Air Force. This adds to company's growing Rs 4200 crore order book.

subject: HDFC Bank Q4FY25 NII Rs 31,200 crore up 9% YoY
ai_summary: HDFC Bank Q4FY25 results show steady performance with NII growth of 9% and credit costs stable. GNPA at 1.3%.

subject: RVNL Q4FY25 Revenue Rs 6,200 crore up 20% YoY
ai_summary: RVNL reports Q4FY25 revenue up 20% YoY. Order book at record Rs 88000 crore. Company on track for 18-20% revenue growth in FY26.

subject: L&T wins Rs 5,000 crore order for defence EPC project
ai_summary: L&T secures a Rs 5000 crore defence manufacturing order which will add to its Rs 5.6 lakh crore order book. Positive for revenue visibility over next 24-30 months.
